data.description:
## Context / Problem

`docs/llm-framework.md` documents the four-pass contract and says projects may add code-review
criteria through the same overlay as plan-review, but it does not document the runtime contract for
how a project code-review criterion actually flows through the pipeline — the contract the other
five children establish. Without it the fixed behavior is undocumented and can silently regress.
This is a purely mechanical documentation change (no new testable behavior), the last item in the
stack.

## Approach

Add a "Code-review project criteria" section to `docs/llm-framework.md` documenting the end-to-end
contract delivered by this epic:

- Round A/B fan-in of activated project criteria and logical `project.<name>` attribution
  [rebar:761e-5af2-ed57-408a].
- Repository-effective routing governing the deterministic Pass 3 [rebar:761e-5af2-ed57-408a].
- The `criteria eval` resolution/admission path for project code-review ids
  [rebar:8153-e9b5-5706-49c8].
- The configuration-error behavior when an activated criterion's prompt/eval spec is missing.

The section must contain the stable contract strings the DD-BUG-4 check greps for:
`Code-review project criteria`, `round_a`, `criteria eval`, `configuration error`,
`effective routing`.

**Rejected alternative.** A separate new doc file — the four-pass contract already lives in
`llm-framework.md`; splitting the code-review project-criterion contract elsewhere would fragment
the single authoritative reference.

## Scope

- `docs/llm-framework.md` — add the "Code-review project criteria" contract section.

(No `## Testing` section: mechanical docs change, no new testable behavior — the acceptance check
is a documentation-content assertion.)

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `docs/llm-framework.md` contains all of `Code-review project criteria`, `round_a`,
      `criteria eval`, `configuration error`, and `effective routing`; verified by
      `rtk .venv/bin/python -c "from pathlib import Path; s=Path('docs/llm-framework.md').read_text(); assert all(x in s for x in ('Code-review project criteria','round_a','criteria eval','configuration error','effective routing'))"`.
data.title: Document the code-review project-criterion runtime contract
